lo-fi hip hop.core: dusty vinyl crackle, detuned piano/Rhodes, mellow jazz samples, tape hiss, relaxed boom-bap drums
lo-fi hip hop.instruments: Rhodes piano, jazz guitar, muted trumpet, SP-404 sampler character, vinyl noise

dark trap.core: 808 sub bass (distorted), rapid hi-hat rolls, dark minor-key melodies, spacey reverb pads
dark trap.instruments: 808 bass, TR-808 hi-hats, dark synth leads, ambient pads, pitched vocal chops
dark trap.texture: heavy low end, spacious highs, aggressive yet atmospheric

acid techno.core: TB-303 squelching basslines (THE signature), 909 drums, resonance sweeps, hypnotic repetition
acid techno.instruments: Roland TB-303, TR-909, analog synths, acid resonance filters

k-pop.core: polished production, layered harmonies, genre-blending (EDM drops + R&B bridges), catchy hooks
k-pop.instruments: layered synths, clean drums, vocal processing, bass drops

ambient.core: evolving pad textures, granular synthesis, field recordings, slow harmonic movement
ambient.instruments: granular synths, reverb-drenched piano, nature samples, tape loops

r&b.core: smooth bass, lush chord voicings, intimate vocal presence, warm production
r&b.instruments: Fender Rhodes, Moog bass, fingerpicked guitar, live drums with swing

shranz_default.core: heavily distorted kick drums, razor-sharp hi-hats, atonal synth stabs, noisy sweeps
